name: Goldenhill & Sandyford
description:
This is most northerly residential community in Stoke-on-Trent shares a border with the Newcastle-under-Lyme Borough and the communities of Kidsgrove.

There is a mix of older and newly built estates in the area and the recently opened Sandyford Community Fire Station sits on Regional Mitch Way.

Local residents in the area use the mytunstall.co.uk website to tackle local issues affecting their community and the wider Tunstall area. Local police officers also regularly contribute to the discussions on the website.
